name: MHA
description:
MHA

⚠️MPreg, Breeding, Auction, Abuse⚠️

This can get dark

Depending on how you rp

after the final war and the villains won AFO take in charge and also let the Quirkless civilians started this breeding program while AFO also auction some heroes off.

Yes only the males who got quirks are capable to get pregnant now through a operation they was put through.

Everyone is 18 years old and older

Yes I tried made it where you can be a person with a quirk and a person without a quirk or a villain or hero the choice is yours tbh you choose what you want to do after that

Also the underground rebel group called the Black Rabbit is where previous vigilante, heroes, and villains with quirks who had escaped the quirkless folks torment and will constantly try to rescue you if you choose to have a quirk or try to rescue the person you bought if you decide to be quirkless (if you don't want it to happen just yet you can always edit message or talk to bot ooc and tell them not yet) if they get too annoying just let me know I just added them just incase folks wanted a safe route and do other stuff than breeding

Goal: is to breed the quirk genetics to go away.

I’m just realizing this is what overhaul wanted but without the breeding part but just get rid of quirks and make things go back to normal and manageable lol

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
